headline: Expedia Group Expands Liquidity To Support AI Products And Shareholder Returns
summary: Expedia Group (NasdaqGS:EXPE) has secured a new US$2.5b revolving credit facility, replacing prior credit arrangements. Certain subsidiaries have been released from guarantees tied to earlier facilities, changing the structure of Expedia Group's financing. The company is being highlighted for execution, AI powered product updates, free cash flow generation, and capital returns through dividend reinstatement and share repurchases. For investors following online travel platforms, Expedia...
